PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Verified Petition For Issuance Of Citation To Prudential Retirement Insurance And Annuity Company
Off Calendar Jun-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

Mr. Byrne presented advocacy regarding the instant petition reporting that he has attempted to contact Prudential Retirement several times and has submitted papers to them on several occasions and they have not replied. Mr. Byrne asks that the court grant his petition and set a status date forty-five days (45) from today.

After additional discussion, the court intends to grant the petition subject to review of the proposed order. A Status on Compliance with Citation is set for Aug-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
